feed.title: SAP Community - Document Information Extraction
feed.subtitle: Document Information Extraction Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Upload file in SAP BTP Document Information Extract from C4C
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Requesting for your help in below case for Document Information Extraction in BTP

We have scenario where we want to extract the PDF file from C4C Ticket and pass it on to SAP BTP Document Information extraction API. We are using the CPI in between.But unable to find the correct API to pass the docuemnt to BTP from C4C Ticket attachement.

Thanks

Ketan

entry.title: Does Process Automation support parallel processing?
entry.content:
G'day all,

Is parallel processing supported in SAP Build Process Automation?

I'm working on an inbound email PDF Invoice process based very much off the Discovery Centre SBPA Invoice Processing Journey and want the ability to spawn parallel flows for each Invoice taken from Outlook (there can be mulitple mails, muliple Invoices per mail, multiple Invoices per PDF). I can't see how this can be achieved.

I'm trying to avoid processing sequentially mostly because the DOX OCR elements take so long. I don't want the AP clerk waiting after each Invoice for the next one to process.

I contemplated running a job on a short time interval and only processing one email per instance, but there is still the potential for multiple invoices per mail.

Any and all advice greatly appreaciated.

Have fun,
Mark

entry.title: Can Document Information Extraction be used to post supplier invoice in SAP ERP ECC 6.0?
entry.content:
Hello,

My understanding is that it is possible with SAP Build Process Automation to create an automated process using Document Information Extraction service to extract data and then post supplier invoices in an S/4HANA on-premise system. This would be done with api_supplierinvoice_process_srv_0001, if that is correct.

However, in my scenario it is an SAP ERP ECC 6.0 on-premise system that is conntected to SAP BTP, using cloud connector. Is it possible to use Document Information Extraction service in a similar way as described above to automatically post supplier invoices and how would this be achieved?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP_IPA_28013: Document Information Extraction service is currently not available
entry.content:
Hello,

In Process Automation,

Since yesterday, unable to load the previously created schemas when trying to create a Document template.

The previously created schemas in that project is not available to map with a new document template.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: lineItemFields not in output of extractedData - Extract Data (Template)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a problem:

When data is extracted from a PDF document, the output 'extractedData' does not contain the 'lineItemFields'.

It only contains 'headerFields' and 'enrichtment' while the template is properly mapped and does contain line as well as the PDF document.

Does anyone knows why this happens? Am I missing something?

Regards,

Hans

entry.title: ClientId of Document Extraction inside SAP Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am using Document Extraction SDK inside SAP Process Automation. I have created some some document templates and I am able to use them to extract data from documents using automation activities. But I want to use APIs to extract data from same Documents Template.

I found the APIs but it requires schemaId and clientId as required input. I found the schemaId but could not found the clientID.

Please help me in this.

Thanks,

Achal

entry.title: Unresponsive page for test automation
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are in starting stage of POC with SPA DIE(Customer's tier account).

Facing with unresponsive page load for testing the bot from 2 hours, Multiple restarts of web browser also, not resolved the issue.

Attaching the screenshot for same.

microsoftteams-image-12.png

Solution along with issue related information would be helpful.

Best Regards:

Ambica

entry.title: Document Information Extraction - Template Inaccurate
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to use the templates feature of Document Information Extraction service for an custom invoice which has purchase order header and item details. The invoice looks like below screenshot.

The issue I am facing with a custom template is that, the line items are being read inaccurately. Even though I have annotated the documents properly for the position of line items and fields as below.

I have uploaded up to 4 documents with same annotations. Still the Extraction results comes like how its shown below.

The line items are ready fully inaccurately. Could anyone please help in addressing the issue here?

Thanks & Regards,

Vishal Raghav

entry.title: SAP Document Information Extraction for Payment Order using excel
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

We have requirement for reading the content of the excel file using dox. At present its only support for document type of payment order with excel file upload. In our case its working fine but we have added some custom fields and could not able to train the model in UI as no preview is available. Please help us to know how can we train model in UI for excel file.

entry.title: Document Information Extraction : Purpose of Documents and Templates
entry.content:
Hi

I have just installed the Document Information Extraction. Wondering what the purpose is for Documents and Templates. If I have 3 different Supplier Invoices do I create 3 documents and then tie all of those into 1 Template ?

I have at the moment uploaded 3 documents - when uploading a document you must choose a schema and a template. You can see from the screenshots that my documents have a template "PetersTest". But when I look at the Template only 1 document is there and this is because I specially added it on that Template tile. I was expecting it to have all 3 documents.

entry.title: SAP CIM and DOX - how are they known to each other?.
entry.content:
Hi

I've learnt from Jie Xiong that SAP CIM is a DOX powered application. I can see that now in the Architecture diagram

I had installed SAP CIM and for a few days was testing the OCR scanning of Supplier Invoices. But I was not happy with the OCR as it was missing elements like the Price and UOM - unless I had a simple Invoice layout it was happy with. Then I stumbled upon Document Information Extraction (DOX).

So I had SAP CIM working in my BTP without even having DOX installed in my BTP !!. So in fact I did not even know that you had to install DOX - well in fact it is not required as it works (poorly) without it.

So I then installed DOX.

During CIM install there was no mention of DOX or Document Information Extraction in the guide (4N6_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf - ok it is mentioned briefly in the Help). In the set up of DOX - I used the BTP Booster there is no mention of CIM nor in its help

So how do the 2 know about each other ?. If I had SAP CIM DEV, QAS & PROD and SAP DOX DEV & PROD how would they know which one to check ?

entry.title: Audience Validation Failed Persists Document Information Extraction
entry.content:
I am trying to make an API call with the token generated with the link: https://b3cxxxxxxxx.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials and my ClientID and ClientSecret as per my Document Information Extraction Secret Key generated on BTP.

The token that I obtained was checked by me on the subject of the audience. And the data in the payload of the token was correct and corresponded to my service key json data.

However, when I try the token in https://aiservices-dox.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/document-information-extraction/v1/, I get the 401 Error Audience validation failed. I tried refreshing the token, refreshing the browser, deleting cookies, and NOTHING WORKED. One day, the token was accepted and the API call was successful; the next day, the new token failed completely randomly and without regard for any rationale. Please advise on how to resolve the bug. Thanks!

P.S Every time I insert my token with Bearer before it. The Audience Failed error is appearing and disappearing regardless. Yesterday I had 40 attemptions to execute an API and it didnt worked. On the 41st attemption it worked. Today I have the problem again with a newly generated token. Apparently, there is a bug. Please advise on how to fix it. Thanks!

entry.title: Processing custom documents through SAP-DIE Tool
entry.content:
Hi,

1. Is there a way I can process the Settlement Statement, Imbalance summary report & Monthly activity reports documents through SAP-DIE Tool other than the default document types already available in the tool which are (Invoice, Payment Advice & Purchase Order)?

2. How, where/when can the custom document type can be selected? (Purpose of the Custom document type).

entry.title: Document information extraction
entry.content: Hi, I would like to know if there is historical data saved somewhere in DOX. Or is DOX model trained based on historical data?

entry.title: DOX further procedure
entry.content:
Hi, what happens after the information is extracted from a document (eg. invoice)? What happens after downloading the extraction in either csv, json or txt? Can you please explain the next step?

Thank you,

Medha

entry.title: Document Information Extraction Consumption Quotes
entry.content: Hello! According to the sap provided information, for the trial BTP subbacount, and the trial subscription to Document Information Extraction, I am only allowed to upload 50 documents per 30 days. How comes, I managed to process 749 documents in the course of 2 days? image.png Please find the screenshots from my Usage Analytics in the attachment. I would appreciate some help to understand my consumption limits. Thank you!

entry.title: Can I train my own Document Information Extraction model?
entry.content:
I am currently trying to figure out a way to train my own Document Information Extraction model. I work with pharmaceutical batch records and need to extract the information. Creating a template for them in the standard Document Information Extraction app wouldn't work because they are all quite diverse. Can someone recommend to me the best approach to take?

Within SAP, where can I develop this application that will allow it to access foundational models? Can I train, test, and verify the model within said development environment? Is there a way to leverage generative AI to aid me?

In a OpenSAP course I did, the lecturers mentioned that we'd be able to further train existing Foundational Models to suite our use cases. Is that available yet, and if so, where is it situated?

How do I access the Generative AI hub? Does it form part of the AI Launchpad?

I am new to the SAP space and find it challenging to navigate all the different products and services.

entry.title: BTP Document Information Extraction Service - Retrieval of deleted document data
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using SAP BTP - Document Information extraction service in which we have created templates & uploaded scanned documents against the templates as well.

Everything was working fine & data was being scanned as well.

Subsequently we observed documents uploaded earlier are automatically being deleted from SAP BTP.

For .e.g, document uploaded on 01st Sept 2023 is no longer visible in BTP.

https://help.sap.com/docs/document-information-extraction/document-information-extraction/data-protection-and-privacy

We wanted to understand if there is a way to restore the documents in SAP BTP Document extraction service

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: SAP Document extraction service not working for uploads
entry.content:
HI Team,
I have tried exploring the Document extraction services(premium) from postman to build some apis to upload the document to extract some information. All get calls related to document extraction services are working in postman and code. But upload functionality not working in postman and code. In the postman input, in form am passing file and client id which are required params. But am getting following error

{
    "error": {
        "code": "E95",
        "message": "Required form-data not provided.",
        "details": [
            {
                "code": "0",
                "message": "Missing parameter: options"
            }
        ]
    }
}
 
Any help is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation?

I know that premium version is needed. 

If yes, how can I enhance the DOX SDK.

 

Thanks !

Tillbtp
